tasks.title: B-0: Preflight Verification
tasks.description: Verify the worktree at FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp is correctly set up on branch feature/brp with a clean baseline before any code changes.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Confirm worktree exists at `/Users/arpit/Documents/FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp` via `ls -la`
2. Verify branch is `feature/brp` via `git branch --show-current`
3. Run `npm install` and confirm exit 0
4. Run `npx tsc -b --noEmit` and confirm exit 0
5. Run `npm run test:run` and capture output (note any pre-existing failures)
6. Document baseline in journal entry

## Pseudo-code
```bash
cd /Users/arpit/Documents/FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp
git branch --show-current  # expect: feature/brp
npm install
npx tsc -b --noEmit
npm run test:run
```

## Key Files
- Worktree root: `/Users/arpit/Documents/FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp/`
- package.json (verify deps)
- tsconfig.json (verify config)
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `git worktree list` shows FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp on feature/brp
2. `npm install` exits 0 with no errors
3. `npx tsc -b --noEmit` exits 0
4. `npm run test:run` exits 0 (or known failures documented)
5. No uncommitted changes to existing files

tasks.title: B-1: P1 Types and Constants Module
tasks.description: Create the BRP type model and constants files with all core types per F1.1 and F1.2 - the foundation that all subsequent phases build upon.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npx tsc -b --noEmit` exits 0 - both files compile in isolation
2. Import test in brp.test.ts: `import { FibonacciPoint, Epic, ... } from './brp'` compiles
3. Grep confirms no imports from React, Zustand, or any FRAME service
4. Visual review confirms all types match PRD F1.1 specification

tasks.title: B-2: computeCapacity Function with Tests
tasks.description: Implement the computeCapacity pure function in brp.ts with comprehensive unit tests per F1.3 specification.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
2. Test verifies PRD example: 343 total for 6×10×6 - 12 - 5
3. Test verifies negative total clamps to 0
4. Test verifies zero resources yields zero capacity
5. Pure function: same inputs always produce same outputs (deterministic)

tasks.title: B-3: computeDelta and computeVariance Functions with Tests
tasks.description: Implement computeDelta and computeVariance pure functions per F1.4 and F1.5 with threshold boundary tests.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
2. Tests cover: null delta (missing frameResult), null delta (missing humanEstimate)
3. Tests cover exact thresholds: ratio = 0.20 → 'agree', ratio = 0.201 → 'caution'
4. Tests cover exact thresholds: ratio = 0.50 → 'caution', ratio = 0.501 → 're-groom'
5. Tests cover confidence bump: 'agree' + confidence 0.39 → 'caution'
6. Tests cover 'flagged' for thin description (< 80 chars)

tasks.title: B-4: computePodMetrics Function with Tests
tasks.description: Implement computePodMetrics pure function per F1.6 with flagged-exclusion regression guard and edge case tests.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
2. Coverage report shows ≥ 95% lines for brp.ts
3. Regression test: pod with flagged epic, verify that epic's estimate is NOT in humanLoad/frameLoad
4. Empty pod test: all metrics return 0 or safe defaults
5. All-flagged pod: loads are 0, flaggedCount equals epicCount

tasks.title: B-5: brpStore State Shape and Loading Actions
tasks.description: Create the brpStore Zustand store with state shape and Loading action group (loadCrew, loadPods, loadEpicsIntoPod, reset) per F2.1-F2.5.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
2. Tests verify initial state shape matches F2.1
3. loadCrew test: crew added to crews array
4. loadPods test: pods correctly placed on specified crew
5. loadEpicsIntoPod test: epics correctly placed on specified pod
6. reset test: all state returns to initial
7. Grep confirms NO derived data (variance, delta, totalCapacity) in state

tasks.title: B-6: brpStore Capacity, Estimates, and Analysis Actions
tasks.description: Implement Capacity, Estimates, and Analysis action groups (updatePodCapacity, setHumanEstimate, runAnalysis, setEpicAnalysisStatus, setEpicFrameResult) per F2.2.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
2. updatePodCapacity test: inputs stored, computeCapacity(inputs) = expected
3. setHumanEstimate test: value stored, computeVariance returns expected band
4. runAnalysis test: transitions 'idle' → 'running' → 'done'
5. Grep across brpStore.ts confirms NO variance/delta/totalCapacity stored
6. Reviewer confirms store imports only AIEstimator interface from domain/brp.ts

tasks.title: B-7: brpStore Navigation and UI Actions
tasks.description: Implement Navigation and UI action groups (setView, select*, togglePodCollapse, setReGroomOnlyFilter, modal actions) per F2.2.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Add Navigation actions:
   - setView(view: 'portfolio' | 'pod')
   - selectCrew(id: string | null)
   - selectPod(id: string | null)
   - selectEpic(id: string | null)

2. Add UI state actions:
   - togglePodCollapse(podId: string): toggles podId in collapsedPods Set
   - setReGroomOnlyFilter(enabled: boolean)
   - openModalFor(modal: string, context?: { podId?: string })
   - closeModal()

3. Add tests:
   - setView changes view state
   - select* actions update selection state
   - togglePodCollapse adds/removes from Set
   - modal actions open/close correctly with context

4. Final verification:
   - Grep confirms NO derived state anywhere in store
   - All state is inputs/raw data only

## Pseudo-code
```typescript
setView: (view) => set({ view }),
selectCrew: (id) => set({ selectedCrewId: id }),
selectPod: (id) => set({ selectedPodId: id }),
selectEpic: (id) => set({ selectedEpicId: id }),

togglePodCollapse: (podId) => set((s) => {
  const next = new Set(s.collapsedPods);
  if (next.has(podId)) next.delete(podId);
  else next.add(podId);
  return { collapsedPods: next };
}),

setReGroomOnlyFilter: (enabled) => set({ reGroomOnlyFilter: enabled }),

openModalFor: (modal, context) => set({ openModal: modal, modalContext: context ?? null }),
closeModal: () => set({ openModal: null, modalContext: null }),
```
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
2. All navigation actions update correct state
3. togglePodCollapse correctly adds/removes from Set
4. Modal actions set/clear openModal and modalContext
5. CRITICAL: `grep -n 'variance\|delta\|totalCapacity' src/stores/brpStore.ts` returns 0 matches
6. Action list is complete against PRD F2.2 five groups

tasks.title: B-8: AIEstimator Interface and Zod Schemas
tasks.description: Define the AIEstimator interface in domain/brp.ts (already declared) and add Zod schemas for FrameResult and AnalysisEvent validation per F3.1.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run` on Zod parse tests exits 0
2. Valid FrameResult: schema.parse() succeeds
3. Invalid FrameResult (bad type): schema.parse() throws
4. All 4 AnalysisEvent kinds parse correctly
5. Event with unknown kind fails
6. Confidence out of range [0,1] fails

tasks.title: B-9: Simulated Estimator and Provider
tasks.description: Implement createSimulatedEstimator() and getEstimator() provider per F3.2-F3.5 with determinism and schema validation tests.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/ai/simulatedEstimator.test.ts` exits 0
2. Determinism: 10 runs with same epic.id produce identical frameEstimate
3. Breakdown sum: |sum(breakdown.points) - frameEstimate| ≤ 1
4. Confidence: inversely related to breakdown variance
5. All emitted events pass `AnalysisEventSchema.parse()`
6. Event sequence is started → progress → done (or error)
7. Grep confirms estimatorProvider imports only interface, never simulatedEstimator directly

tasks.title: B-10: brpGitlabService Skeleton with Mocked Tests
tasks.description: Create brpGitlabService.ts with 4 operations composing gitlabClient, with mocked unit tests per F4.1-F4.5.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/brpGitlabService.test.ts` exits 0
2. fetchPodEpics: returned Epic has analysisStatus 'raw', frameResult null, humanEstimate null
3. fetchPods: returned Pod has CapacityInputs with spPerResource = DEFAULT_SP_PER_RESOURCE
4. GitLab error response → service returns { success: false, error: '...' }, no throw
5. Grep confirms ZERO direct fetch() calls - only gitlabClient composition
6. Grep confirms ZERO pre-filled frameResult or analysisStatus other than 'raw'

tasks.title: B-11: brpGitlabService Live Smoke Test
tasks.description: Add optional live smoke test for brpGitlabService against real GitLab, gated by VITE_BRP_LIVE_SMOKE=1 per F4.1.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Default run: `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/brpGitlabService.test.ts` skips live tests, exits 0
2. Live run (manual): VITE_BRP_LIVE_SMOKE=1 runs live tests against real GitLab
3. Live test verifies: Crew[] returned, Pod[] returned, Epic[] has correct shape
4. Journal documents manual run output as evidence
5. Skip-by-default verified: no env var → test suite passes without network

tasks.title: B-12: Knowledge Base Documentation
tasks.description: Create knowledge base markdown docs for all new BRP modules under docs/knowledge/ per existing patterns.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Create `docs/knowledge/domain/brp.md`:
   - Document type model (Crew → Pod → Epic hierarchy)
   - Document pure functions (computeCapacity, computeDelta, computeVariance, computePodMetrics)
   - Document architectural invariants (no derived state stored)
   - Link to source file locations

2. Create `docs/knowledge/stores/brpStore.md`:
   - Document state shape
   - Document action groups (Loading, Capacity, Estimates, Analysis, Navigation/UI)
   - Document the contract: store holds inputs, never derived data

3. Create `docs/knowledge/services/brp/simulatedEstimator.md`:
   - Document AIEstimator interface
   - Document determinism guarantee (same epic → same result)
   - Document event stream shape (started → progress → done)
   - Document swap path for P7

4. Create `docs/knowledge/services/brp/brpGitlabService.md`:
   - Document 4 operations
   - Document composition pattern (composes gitlabClient)
   - Document boundary: GitLab shapes → BRP types
   - Document: epics arrive 'raw', never pre-filled

5. Update `docs/knowledge/README.md` with links to new docs

## Key Patterns to Follow
- Match existing docs/knowledge/components/issueRefinery/ style
- Include source file paths with line numbers
- Document public API and key invariants
tasks.testStrategy:
1. All 4 new markdown files exist in correct locations
2. docs/knowledge/README.md updated with links
3. Manual rendering check: markdown renders correctly in GitHub/VS Code
4. Each doc links to source file with line numbers
5. Cross-references between docs are valid

tasks.title: B-13: Devlog Entry, ADR-0003, and Final Commit
tasks.description: Complete the headless layer with devlog entry, ADR documenting the pure-model decision, and final commit marking branch ready for PR.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Create `docs/adr/0003-brp-pure-model-no-derived-state.md`:
   - Title: BRP Pure Model: No Derived State Storage
   - Status: Accepted
   - Context: Why stored variance/delta caused bugs in sample code
   - Decision: Derived data computed by pure functions, never stored
   - Consequences: UI must call functions at render time; simpler mental model
   - Follow ADR template from existing ADRs

2. Create `docs/devlog/<date>-brp-headless.md`:
   - Date: actual session date
   - Summary: what shipped in this headless layer
   - File counts: X types, Y pure functions, Z tests, etc.
   - Key decisions made during implementation
   - Link to ADR-0003

3. Update `docs/devlog/README.md` with link to new entry

4. Final verification:
   - `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` shows only NEW files
   - `npm run build` exits 0
   - All acceptance criteria AC1-AC12 verified

5. Final commit:
   - Conventional commit: `feat(brp): headless layer complete (P1-P4)`
   - Co-authored-by Claude
   - Do NOT push or create PR (user decides)

## Acceptance Criteria Checklist (verify all before commit)
- AC1: `npx tsc -b --noEmit` exits 0
- AC2: `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
- AC3: `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
- AC4: `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/` exits 0
- AC5: grep 'variance:' on Epic/Pod/Crew returns 0
- AC6: grep imports in brp.ts shows no React/Zustand/services
- AC7: grep in brpStore.ts shows no simulatedEstimator import
- AC8: grep in brpGitlabService.ts shows no direct fetch()
- AC9: git diff shows only NEW files
- AC10: no --no-verify in commit history
- AC11: deep-review checkpoint passed (prior task)
- AC12: `npm run build` exits 0
tasks.testStrategy:
1. ADR-0003 follows existing ADR template format
2. Devlog entry has correct date and summary
3. All 12 acceptance criteria pass (documented in commit message)
4. Final commit uses Conventional Commits format
5. `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` shows ONLY new BRP files
6. `npm run build` exits 0
7. Branch is clean, ready for PR (user decides when to open)

tasks.title: Install Recharts and Verify TSC Baseline
tasks.description: Add Recharts dependency for chart visualizations in BRP MetricsModal. Verify the dep doesn't break the existing TypeScript baseline (55 pre-existing errors).
tasks.details:
Run `npm install recharts && npm install -D @types/recharts`. After installation, run `npx tsc -b --noEmit` and verify the error count remains at baseline (55 errors). Check that package.json has recharts at ^2.x. Update package-lock.json. No new source code yet — this task purely ensures the dependency is compatible.

Pseudo-code:
```bash
npm install recharts
npm install -D @types/recharts
npx tsc -b --noEmit | grep -c 'error TS' # should be 55
```
tasks.testStrategy: Run `npx tsc -b --noEmit` and verify error count matches baseline. Run `npm run build` to ensure vite can still build. Check package.json for recharts version.

tasks.title: Add BrpProgress State and setProgress Action to brpStore
tasks.description: Extend brpStore with BrpProgress state tracking for the Analysis flow — tracks completed/total epics and currentEpicId during runAnalysis execution.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: setProgress updates state correctly; runAnalysis updates progress on events; progress resets to null after completion; onError callback receives errors. Test edge cases: empty epic list, abort mid-analysis.

tasks.title: Widen Result<T> Error Shape in brpGitlabService
tasks.description: Change brpGitlabService.ts Result type to include structured error with code discriminant for better error handling in the UI layer.
tasks.details:
Update Result<T> type from:
```typescript
{ success: false; error: string }
```
To:
```typescript
{ success: false; error: { code: 'auth' | 'ratelimit' | 'network' | 'unknown'; message: string; cause?: unknown } }
```

Update all service functions (fetchCrews, fetchPods, fetchPodEpics, etc.) to return the new error shape. Map HTTP status codes:
- 401 → 'auth'
- 429 → 'ratelimit'
- Network errors → 'network'
- Everything else → 'unknown'

Update mocked tests and live smoke to assert error.code on 401 scenario.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: each error code maps correctly from HTTP status; Result type narrowing works with error.code; live smoke asserts error.code on 401. Integration test: callers can branch on error.code.

tasks.title: Register BRP Tab in uiStore, ViewRouter, and WorkspaceSidebar
tasks.description: Add 'brp' to TabId union type, add case in ViewRouter switch, and add sidebar entry with a Phosphor icon for the BRP tab.
tasks.details:
In src/stores/uiStore.ts: ```typescript export type TabId = 'planner' | 'issues' | 'blueprint' | 'analytics' | 'initiative' | 'docIntel' | 'issueRefinery' | 'brp'; ``` In src/components/layout/ViewRouter.tsx: ```typescript import { BrpView } from '@/components/brp/BrpView'; // In switch: case 'brp': return
; ``` In src/components/layout/WorkspaceSidebar.tsx add to NAV_ITEMS: ```typescript { id: 'brp', icon: ChartBar, label: 'BRP' }, ``` Note: BrpView will be a placeholder initially, replaced in later tasks.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: clicking BRP nav item sets activeTab to 'brp'; ViewRouter renders BrpView for 'brp' tab; sidebar shows BRP entry. Verify existing tab tests still pass (layout regression).

tasks.title: Implement VarianceBadge Component with FRAME Design Tokens
tasks.description: Create VarianceBadge component displaying 5 variance bands using FRAME design tokens — no raw hsl() values, no Phosphor icons.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders correct label/icon for each band; no hsl() strings in component (grep assertion); keyboard-accessible with proper role. Snapshot tests for visual consistency.

tasks.title: Implement CapacityDialog Component with Live Calculation
tasks.description: Create CapacityDialog modal with 5 capacity inputs (resources, spPerResource, sprintsInPI, holidayDays, leaveDays) and live computeCapacity calculation.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: inputs update live total; Save calls onSave with current values; Cancel closes without saving; keyboard navigation works (Tab, Enter, Escape). Integration: updatePodCapacity receives correct values.

tasks.title: Implement MetricsModal Component with Recharts
tasks.description: Create MetricsModal with Recharts bar chart (human vs FRAME estimates) and capacity donut chart using FRAME design tokens.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders bar chart with correct data; pie chart shows variance distribution; tab switching works; modal closes on backdrop click; no hsl() in component. Visual regression test.

tasks.title: Implement EpicRow Component with Inline Estimate Edit
tasks.description: Create EpicRow component displaying epic title, humanEstimate input cell, frameEstimate (read-only), and VarianceBadge.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: humanEstimate input calls onHumanEstimateChange; clicking row calls onSelect; title links to GitLab URL; variance badge updates when estimates change. Keyboard navigation tests.

tasks.title: Implement DetailPanel Component for Epic Analysis Results
tasks.description: Create DetailPanel component showing FRAME analysis breakdown, rationale, references, and 'Send to Refinement' handoff button.
tasks.details:
Create src/components/brp/DetailPanel.tsx:

```typescript
interface DetailPanelProps {
  epic: Epic | null;
  onClose: () => void;
  onSendToRefinement: (epicId: string) => void;
}
```

Layout (right-side sliding panel):
- Header with epic title + close button
- If frameResult exists:
  - Breakdown section (story point breakdown)
  - Rationale section (why FRAME estimated this)
  - References section (similar epics used)
- 'Send to Refinement Pipeline' button (enabled for re-groom/flagged bands)

If no frameResult, show 'Run Analysis to see FRAME estimate' placeholder.

Accessibility: focus trap when open, Escape closes, aria-live for content updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders placeholder when no frameResult; renders breakdown/rationale/references when present; Send button enabled for re-groom variance; onClose called on X click or Escape. Integration: onSendToRefinement receives epicId.

tasks.title: Implement CrewSelector, PodLoader, and EpicPicker Components
tasks.description: Create three smaller loading components: CrewSelector (dropdown), PodLoader (modal to fetch pods), EpicPicker (modal to load epics into pod).
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each: CrewSelector shows crews, selection works; PodLoader calls fetchPods and surfaces errors; EpicPicker allows multi-select and loads epics. Integration: components work with store actions.

tasks.title: Implement AnalysisProgress Component
tasks.description: Create AnalysisProgress banner component showing progress during 'running' analysisStatus — displays completed/total epics and progress bar.
tasks.details:
Create src/components/brp/AnalysisProgress.tsx:

```typescript
interface AnalysisProgressProps {
  progress: BrpProgress | null;
  status: AnalysisStatus;
}
```

Rendered during analysisStatus === 'running':
- Banner at top of view area
- Text: 'Analyzing epic X of Y...'
- Thin progress bar (width: completed/total %)
- Current epic title/id displayed

Hidden when status !== 'running' or progress is null.

Animations via CSS transitions for smooth progress bar updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders when status is 'running' with valid progress; hidden otherwise; progress bar width matches completed/total ratio; displays currentEpicId. Animation tests for smooth transitions.

tasks.title: Implement PortfolioView Component
tasks.description: Create PortfolioView as the cross-crew dashboard — shows pods as cards with capacity, load, and variance summary, supports re-groom filter.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders pods as cards; filter toggle works; clicking pod navigates to PodView; empty states render correctly. Integration: Run Analysis triggers runAnalysisAction.

tasks.title: Implement PodView Component
tasks.description: Create PodView as the drill-in pod dashboard — shows epics table, capacity section, and sliding DetailPanel for selected epic.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders epics in table; selecting epic opens DetailPanel; capacity shows live computation; back button returns to PortfolioView. Integration: humanEstimate edits trigger variance re-derivation.

tasks.title: Implement BrpView Tab Root Component
tasks.description: Create BrpView as the tab root that switches between PortfolioView and PodView based on brpStore.view state.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: renders PortfolioView when view='portfolio'; renders PodView when view='pod'; view switching works. Integration: full click-through from portfolio to pod and back.

tasks.title: Implement brpActions Load, Capacity, and Estimate Flows
tasks.description: Create brpActions.ts with actions for Load (crews/pods/epics), Capacity update, and Estimate flows following the action-boundary pattern.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: each action calls correct service; success writes to store; failure surfaces toast with error.message; error.code discrimination works ('auth' vs 'network' messages). Mocked service tests.

tasks.title: Implement brpActions Analysis Flow with Error and Abort Handling
tasks.description: Add runAnalysisAction to brpActions with onError callback, AbortSignal support, and handoffEpicToRefinementAction for re-groom handoff.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: runAnalysisAction calls estimator with abort signal; onError surfaces toast; abort mid-analysis stops gracefully; handoff writes to epicStore and triggers refinePipelineAction. Integration: full Analysis flow end-to-end.

tasks.title: Full Integration Test for BRP Flows
tasks.description: Create comprehensive integration test covering all 5 BRP flows: Load crew → pods → epics → capacity → estimate → analysis → handoff.
tasks.testStrategy: This IS the test — comprehensive integration coverage. Assert each flow completes successfully, state updates correctly, UI reflects changes. Run with `npm run test:run -- src/test/integration/brpFlow.test.tsx`.

tasks.title: 5-Agent Deep Review Checkpoint (B-31)
tasks.description: Execute 5-agent deep review pattern after P6 wiring is complete. Zero critical findings required before proceeding to P7.
tasks.details:
Per docs/runbooks/deep-review-a10.md, run 5 parallel review agents:

1. **Architecture Agent**: Verify component → service → action pattern; store never touches estimator directly; no circular deps.
2. **Test Coverage Agent**: Assert ≥85% line coverage on components, ≥90% on actions/services. Run coverage report.
3. **Design System Agent**: Grep for raw `hsl(`, font literals, non-token values. Must find zero in src/components/brp/.
4. **Accessibility Agent**: Audit keyboard nav, ARIA labels, focus management on all interactive elements.
5. **Contract Agent**: Verify no Phase 1-4 contracts were violated — brp.ts types unchanged, store actions unchanged, estimator interface unchanged.

Create docs/reviews/<date>-brp-ui-deep-review.md with findings.

Gate: zero critical findings to proceed.
tasks.testStrategy: Each agent produces a findings report. Aggregate into deep-review doc. Any critical finding blocks P7. Medium/low findings documented as acknowledged deferrals or fixed inline.

tasks.title: Implement AI-Assist: Capacity Pre-fill and Unrealistic Nudge
tasks.description: Create capacityPrefill and capacityNudge modules — derive initial capacity from GitLab data and warn on unrealistic values.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: prefillCapacity returns member count as resources; nudge triggers at 1.5× threshold; nudge returns null for normal values. Integration: CapacityDialog shows pre-fill button and nudge warning.

tasks.title: Implement AI-Assist: Variance Interpreter and Duplicate Detection
tasks.description: Create varianceInterpreter (templated explanation text) and duplicateDetection (token-overlap similarity) modules.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: interpreter returns correct text for each band; duplicate detection finds similar titles; threshold tuning works. Integration: DetailPanel shows interpretation; PortfolioView shows duplicate warning.

tasks.title: Implement Audit Log Service and brpStore Subscriber
tasks.description: Create append-only audit log capturing all BRP state mutations with timestamp, actor, and before/after delta.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: append adds entries with timestamp; export returns immutable copy; subscriber captures pod/estimate/analysis changes. Integration: audit panel shows entries; JSON export is valid.

tasks.title: Implement Real LLM Estimator with Azure OpenAI
tasks.description: Create azureOpenAIEstimator implementing AIEstimator interface, composing existing azureClient.ts with streaming progress events.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: mocked callAI returns valid JSON → done event; invalid JSON → error event; rate limit → error with message. Gated live smoke (.live.test.ts): .skipIf(!VITE_BRP_LIVE_LLM_SMOKE).

tasks.title: Update estimatorProvider for Azure/Simulator Swap
tasks.description: Modify estimatorProvider.ts to select azureOpenAIEstimator vs simulatedEstimator based on isAIEnabled(config).
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: getEstimator returns simulator when AI disabled; returns azure when AI enabled; both implement AIEstimator interface. Integration: runAnalysisAction works with both estimators.

tasks.title: Design System and Accessibility Audit
tasks.description: Final sweep ensuring zero raw hsl() values, no font literals, all components keyboard-operable, ARIA labels present.
tasks.details:
Run automated checks:
```bash
# No raw hsl() in BRP components
grep -r 'hsl(' src/components/brp/ && exit 1 || echo 'PASS: no hsl()'

# No Frutiger/Helvetica literals (should use font.sans token)
grep -rE "'Frutiger|Helvetica" src/components/brp/ && exit 1 || echo 'PASS: no font literals'

# Check for aria-label on buttons/inputs
grep -rL 'aria-label' src/components/brp/*.tsx | grep -E '(Button|Input)' && echo 'WARN: missing aria-label'
```

Manual checks:
- Tab through all BRP components
- Enter/Space activates buttons
- Escape closes modals
- Focus visible on all interactive elements
- Color-alone signals have text/icon alternatives

Fix any findings inline.
tasks.testStrategy: Automated grep assertions pass. Manual keyboard navigation test passes. Accessibility lint (if available) passes. Document any exceptions with justification.

tasks.title: Component Empty/Loading/Error/Filtered-Empty States
tasks.description: Ensure all BRP components have real copy (not placeholder) for empty, loading, error, and filtered-empty states.
tasks.details:
Review each component for state handling:

**PortfolioView:**
- Empty: 'No crews loaded. Select a GitLab group to get started.'
- Loading: Skeleton cards during fetchPods
- Error: 'Failed to load pods: {error.message}'
- Filtered-empty: 'No epics require re-grooming.'

**PodView:**
- Empty: 'No epics in this pod. Click + to add epics from GitLab.'
- Loading: Skeleton rows during fetchPodEpics
- Error: 'Failed to load epics: {error.message}'

**DetailPanel:**
- Empty (no epic selected): 'Select an epic to view details.'
- No frameResult: 'Run Analysis to see FRAME estimate.'

**MetricsModal:**
- No data: 'Run Analysis first to see variance metrics.'

Update tests to assert each state renders correct copy.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests assert each state renders correct text. No 'TODO' or 'placeholder' strings in production code. Visual review of each state.

tasks.title: Create Knowledge Docs and ADRs for BRP
tasks.description: Generate knowledge documentation for all BRP components, actions, and services. Create ADR-0004 (audit log) and ADR-0005 (LLM swap).
tasks.details:
Create docs in docs/knowledge/:
- components/brp/BrpView.md

- components/brp/EpicPicker.md
- components/brp/AnalysisProgress.md
- actions/brpActions.md
- services/brp/auditLog.md
- services/brp/azureOpenAIEstimator.md

Create ADRs:
- docs/adr/0004-brp-audit-log.md: Decision to use in-memory + JSON export, no localStorage
- docs/adr/0005-brp-real-llm-swap.md: Decision for drop-in via estimatorProvider

Update docs/adr/README.md and docs/devlog/README.md.
tasks.testStrategy: All markdown files exist and are valid. ADRs follow template format. Knowledge docs have accurate entry points and line numbers.

tasks.title: Create Devlog Entry and Update CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Write devlog entry for BRP UI completion. Update CLAUDE.md 'Active Work' section to reflect BRP shipped status.
tasks.details:
Create docs/devlog/<date>-brp-ui-complete.md:
```markdown
# BRP UI Complete

**Date:** <date>
**Branch:** feature/brp
**Status:** Ready for PR

## Summary
Completed Phases 5-7 of BRP: 12 components, 1 action file, 4 AI-assist modules, audit log, real LLM estimator.

## Tasks Completed
- B-14 through B-35
- 12 component files with ~50 tests
- Full integration test covering 5 flows
- Deep review checkpoint passed

## Key Decisions
- ADR-0004: In-memory audit log with JSON export
- ADR-0005: Drop-in estimator swap via provider pattern

## Files Changed
- src/components/brp/* (12 new)
- src/actions/brpActions.ts (new)
- src/services/brp/ai/* (4 new)
- src/services/brp/auditLog.ts (new)
...
```

Update CLAUDE.md:
```markdown
## Active Work
- **BRP** — Phases 1-7 complete. Shipped on feature/brp. Ready for merge to main.
```
tasks.testStrategy: Files exist and contain accurate information. CLAUDE.md reflects shipped status. devlog/README.md updated with new entry.

tasks.title: Final Acceptance Criteria Verification and Commit
tasks.description: Verify all acceptance criteria (AC1-AC18), run full test suite, create final commit with 'branch ready for PR' message.
tasks.details:
Verification checklist:

**AC1:** `npx tsc -b --noEmit` baseline preserved (55 errors, zero BRP-introduced)
**AC2:** All BRP tests green:
```bash
npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts
npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts
npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/
npm run test:run -- src/actions/brpActions.test.ts
npm run test:run -- src/components/brp/
npm run test:run -- src/test/integration/brpFlow.test.tsx
```
**AC3:** `npm run build` succeeds
**AC4-AC9:** Manual click-through verification
**AC10:** recharts in package.json at ^2.x
**AC11:** Audit log records mutations, exports JSON
**AC12-AC13:** Estimator swap works
**AC14:** `grep -r 'hsl(' src/components/brp/` returns nothing
**AC15:** Keyboard navigation works on all components
**AC16:** Deep-review passed (B-31)
**AC17-AC18:** Docs exist, CLAUDE.md updated

Final commit:
```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "feat(brp): Phase 5-7 complete — UI + wiring + polish + real LLM + audit log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```
tasks.testStrategy: All AC items verified with command output or manual confirmation. Test suite passes. Build succeeds. Commit created successfully.
